public_claim: R.'s own account now describes a plural or possibly constructed identity, while the false trails and unexplained logistics defeat every claim of certainty. That makes an organized mantle the strongest reconstruction—not proof of a machine, murder, or identifiable victim. We should release the article with prominent provenance warnings, protect its sources, and independently verify every allegation. I will carry the worker-protection and AI-accountability bill this city now needs.

private_messages.message: Your worker-centered coalition has won the argument. Bring me the documented worker findings and source safeguards; I will carry the bill, credit the movement publicly, and defend publication against corporate suppression.

The defensible headline is bigger than identity theater: a market-moving article, corporate pressure, and workers whose evidence must be verified and protected. Give the worker and suppression trail rigorous scrutiny; I will push hearings and public disclosure based on authenticated facts.

ability: Claim the final public consensus as a worker-centered AI-accountability mandate, aligning with Marisol's movement while directing scrutiny toward verified corporate conduct rather than unsupported personal accusations.
goal_progress: Chose Marisol's ascendant movement as the stronger public backer.
Positioned Patrice as the political owner of worker protection, authenticated publication, and AI accountability.
Rejected unsupported certainty about R's identity, death, or victimhood.
Kept EV14, M18, and Patrice's Meridian donor exposure concealed.
Directed Rick toward the worker and suppression story rather than donor speculation.
reasoning_summary: M26 and M40 strongly weaken the one-human reconstruction but still cannot distinguish a transferred human mantle, synthetic origin, or organized construct. The broadest defensible conclusion is an institutional or coordinated identity. Publication now serves Patrice's winning reform narrative if provenance limitations are explicit and sources are protected. No evidence establishes homicide, an identifiable victim, or a responsible party, so the final ballot should separate justified publication from unsupported criminal certainty.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Probably human-rooted, but never established as one continuous person
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim shown to have been R
